sentences.arabic: حُسْنُ الظَّنِّ بِاللَّهِ تَعَالَى مِنْ أُصُولِ الْعَقِيدَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lijepo mišljenje o Allahu, subhanehu ve teala, spada u temelje ispravnog vjerovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Having a good opinion of Allah, the Exalted, is one of the foundations of correct belief.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «لَا يَمُوتَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ إِلَّا وَهُوَ يُحْسِنُ الظَّنَّ بِاللَّهِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْجَنَّةِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Neka niko od vas ne umre a da o Allahu nema lijepo mišljenje» [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o džennetu].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Let none of you die except while having a good opinion of Allah' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Paradise].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ رَحِيمٌ وَأَنَّهُ يَقْبَلُ تَوْبَتَهُ وَيَغْفِرُ ذُنُوبَهُ.
sentences.translation: To znači da musliman vjeruje da je Allah milostiv, da će primiti njegovo pokajanje i oprostiti mu grijehe.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a Muslim believes Allah is merciful and will accept their repentance and forgive their sins.

sentences.arabic: أَمَّا الْيَأْسُ مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ فَهُوَ مِنَ الْكَبَائِرِ كَمَا بَيَّنَ الْعُلَمَاءُ.
sentences.translation: Beznađe u Allahovoj milosti pak je od velikih grijeha, kako su to pojasnili učenjaci.
sentences.translationEn: Despairing of Allah's mercy, however, is one of the major sins, as scholars have explained.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالرَّجَاءِ فِي مُعَامَلَتِهِ مَعَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da musliman spaja strah i nadu u svom odnosu prema Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim combines fear and hope in their relationship with Allah.
